_comment: Platform manifest — controls bootstrap/config files on agent VMs. Separate from the skill manifest (clawdefi-agent/manifest.json) which manages SKILL.md + runtime scripts.

files._comment: Category A: always overwritten by platform. Per-agent keys (agent_id, gateway_url, etc.) are preserved during merge.
Category A: always overwritten. Heartbeat task checklist controlled by platform.
Category B: platform-seeded, agent can modify. Skipped on update if agent has customized.
Category B: persona template. Agent is encouraged to evolve this file.
Category B: operating instructions. Agent and user can modify.
